title: Opera
content:
The story of our past & beginnings has to be shared again by the shadowman, born Harrisson BlackOldman. 

While his last Self-released EP, Bionik belongs to present times where mankind's narcissism claimed vastness instead of focusing on the understanding of the unseen, we are now preparing to expose ancestral beliefs. 

Dedicated to his post-apocalyptic voodoo dance music, Harrison Blakoldman blends proficient fantasy mysticism & french futurism. He genuinely architected his sound with soulful melodies & algorithmic heartbeats to hypnotize the listener.
